summary: Tested driver details feature - GET /api/drivers/{driver_id}/details API and DriverDetailPage frontend. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend navigation, 3 tabs, photo display, and back button all verified working.
seed_data_creation: Created test user for frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver details feature fully implemented and working. API endpoint /api/drivers/{driver_id}/details returns complete driver data with photo URL, palmares (F1 + junior), contract info, personal info, social media links, and 10 random useful facts. Frontend page accessible via /driver/:driverId with 3 tabs (Pilote, Palmarès, Infos). Navigation from ChampionshipPage works by clicking on driver rows.

tests: Returns complete driver data for valid driver ID
Includes photo_url from F1 media CDN
Generates exactly 10 useful_facts with proper structure
All 22 drivers accessible and return valid data
Driver photo displayed in header with team color border
Driver number badge displayed in top right
Quick stats (Victoires, Podiums, Poles) shown below photo
3 tabs (Pilote, Palmarès, Infos) displayed and functional
Tab 'Pilote' shows personal info and contract details
Tab 'Palmarès' shows F1 career stats and junior career
Tab 'Infos' shows 10 useful facts with icons

response_structure.useful_facts: [10 random facts with title, text, icon]
